how: Removed the real-device phone-shell frame, separated BottomNav from shared pink chip outlines, added a controlled ToggleSwitch for KTO tourism, replaced AppCapsule menu/back glyphs with local SVG icons, and added unit/source-quality/E2E regression tests.
problem: The real-device app chrome wasted screen space with a preview frame, large bottom-nav spacing, pink outlines, a chip-style tourism toggle, and low-clarity text glyph controls.
why: Real-device screenshots showed that the global app chrome needed practical polish before the capsule navigation architecture could be considered usable on phones.
